decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id 'project_nostrand-rogers-sbs' already exists in the registry and is the correct canonical record for this project. The registry record includes this same source (20091208_nostrand_cac_slides) in its source_ids, and both the observation payload and registry record describe the same real-world project: proposed SBS on Nostrand Avenue (southbound) and Rogers Avenue (northbound), converting B44 Limited to SBS in Brooklyn. Per canonicalization rules, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' — the observation already resolves to that id.
